title: System Power Up Procedure
description:
System Power Up Procedure

System Power Up Procedure

Follow this procedure to power up the system:

Ensure
	 that all safeguards are in place and that all personnel are clear
	 of the equipment.

Apply
	 power to the Controller, monitor, and I/O devices.

Start
	 the Epson RC+ 8.0 software on the PC, if the PC is used in the system.
